counters.description: a good rengar is very hard to beat. who ever gets the first hit in usually wins unless the other is extremely strong. play around his fury, if he has a way to get 4 fury combo then avoid at all costs. zhonyas or an early armguard is a good purchase.
a good kindred's early pressure is hard to deal with, they can out duel you but if you manage to get some levels on them you are able to win.
hard matchup, using a click she can always knock you out of your engage/burst. practicing spacing and doing zhonyas buffer combos with your takedown.

i put him in major as he becomes hard to deal with until you are extremely good at nidalee, then he goes down to a 3. similar to lillia in the respect of needing to outclear him, early fights are yours if you get the initiative.

hecarim can be unstoppable after he gets snowballing, the new items are crazy strong on him. early fights are hard to win because of conqueror and his q cd going down, if you cant kill him in your initial jump in combo you will lose and he will take over the game.

synergies.description: w allows you to land your spear every time, strong early game enables your aggressive invades and ganks to work.
hard cc for the spear with q/r, strong skirmishes with her and converts well to late game too.
land spears off his q/time off his r, can also roam with you and take over the map.
e is awesome to use on kaisa while fighting/hitting baron to increase dps
good solo lanes are important to nidalee, allows you to fight early and look for invades is what you want. try to enable and free up camille to help you and you'll get good results.
